title: KFC India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: KFC India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
